description_long: This is a sleek, muscular dog with a short, glossy black coat accented by rich rust markings on its muzzle, chest, legs, and above the eyes. The animal has a deep chest, a straight back, and a well-defined, athletic build, typical of working breeds. Its head is wedge-shaped with a long, straight muzzle and a strong jaw, while the ears are cropped and stand erect, giving it an alert and attentive expression. The tail is short and held straight, blending seamlessly with the streamlined body. The legs are long and sturdy, built for agility and speed, and the paws are compact and arched. The overall appearance is elegant yet powerful, exuding confidence and readiness.
description: A muscular, black dog with rust markings, erect cropped ears, and a short straight tail, exuding an alert and athletic presence.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the dog's strong build, cropped erect ears, and short straight tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wedge-shaped head, erect ears, and symmetrical rust markings on the chest and legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring the muscular build and coloration, with clear view of the straight back and tail.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the broad hindquarters, short tail, and rust markings on the back legs.
